title: KaromiSMP4
body:
![KSMP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71a4cd17499b3359cfc226f7484c085a2346e2d6.jpeg)

**What is this about?**

- This is the official modpack for the KSMP⁴ server hosted by Karomi! It's an osu! community-based server where osu! players and content creators come together, have fun and create content!
  
- This modpack is aims for a vanilla+ experience, therefore it does not include much except for client-sided mods that enhance the overall experience. Some mods are required though which is why this modpack is necessary to join the SMP!

**For more information, join the [Discord server]([https://discord.gg/pMAwRMkfwu](https://discord.gg/pMAwRMkfwu)).**
